description: Black and pink low-top casual shoesMeshed upper for breathability with overlaysSynthetic leather toe guard liningSynthetic laces for durability and snug fitStitching accents with side brand logo detailing on the midfoot regionPadded collar and tongue with brandingPadded, soft footbed for added comfortMidsole made of Resalyte which increases cushioning for enhanced shock absorptionTPR rubber sole with square lugs and horizontal ridges to provide superior gripHigh abrasion rubber toe box embedded on the upper for shock absorption
